title: SWU-PGN replay record
description: Schema for a single JSON object in the `=== REPLAY ===` section of a .swureplay file (one record per line). The format version is carried in the file's [Game] header tag (currently "SWU-PGN v1.0"). Records are intentionally open (additionalProperties is allowed) so readers tolerate fields added in later versions.

seq.description: Position of the event in the game. Forms: R{round}.{phase}.{action} (top-level), R{round}.{phase}.{action}{letter} (sub-event), R{round}.{phase}.{counter} (setup/regroup), R{round}.start / R{round}.end (round boundaries), R{round}.{phase}.start / .end (phase boundaries), and {actionSeq}-snapshot (full state snapshot). Phase is S=Setup, A=Action, G=Regroup.

card.description: Card reference: SET#NUM, SET#NUM:N for the Nth copy of a card in play, or TOKEN:{name} / TOKEN:{name}:N for tokens.

source.description: Card reference for the source of an effect (e.g. damage).

target.description: Card reference for the target of an effect.

attacker.description: Card reference of the attacking unit (ATTACK records).

defender.description: Card reference of the defending unit or base (ATTACK records).

defeatedBy.description: Card reference that caused a DEFEAT.

playType.description: How a card was played (e.g. playFromHand, smuggle, piloting).

amount.description: Magnitude for DAMAGE / HEAL / count-bearing records.

remainingHp.description: Target's remaining HP after the effect.

reason.description: Reason string for DEFEAT or GAME_END.

count.description: Number of cards drawn (DRAW) or searched (SEARCH).

wholeDeck.description: True when a SEARCH looked at the entire deck.

cards.description: Card references for multi-card records (DRAW, REVEAL).

winner.description: Winner code for GAME_END (e.g. P1, P2).

snapshot.description: Full serialized game state for a -snapshot GAME_STATE record (the same structure the spectator UI renders). Player names/ids are anonymized to Player 1 / Player 2.
